eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 1:15 PM on JUN 10, 2026 Effective until 9:15 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Maricopa County Sheriffs Office. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Maricopa County Sheriffs Office is looking for Stanley Avelos last seen driving a 2015 White Chevrolet Silverado with Arizona Plate BXJ5265. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
